pi_items.source: Confirmed by task.json instructions, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh.
Confirmed by task.json instructions, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh.
Confirmed by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, as well as the official OpenToonz sample repo.
verifier.py requires a minimum of 5 new output frames for full points on the render criterion. The original sample scene contains 72 frames.

pi_items.verified_value: Any red with R > 120 and R > (G+B)*0.8
pi_items.source: verifier.py checks for red pixels using the condition: r > 120 and r > (g + b) * 0.8, not strictly requiring #FF0000.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real sample scene file ('dwanko_run.tnz', 72 frames) sourced from the official OpenToonz GitHub repository. The user must save the output to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/hud_test/hud_test.tnz' and render it to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/hud_test'. The verifier does not strictly enforce 10 rendered frames or the hex color #FF0000; instead, it awards full render points for 5 or more frames and visually verifies any red color where R > 120 and R > (G+B)*0.8.
